meta.title: WISE Top 100 Global Assets
meta.scoring_methodology: Editorial portfolio heuristic (0-100). portfolio_score = round(0.35*recognition_score + 0.35*demand_score + 0.30*commercial_score, 1). Scores are curatorial estimates for product prioritization, not measured analytics.
meta.note: Portfolio prioritization seed for the Phase 12 Products catalogue; not a paywall on canonical public memory (ADR-010).

assets.title: Taj Mahal
assets.historical_significance: Mughal marble mausoleum (1632-1653), a global symbol of love and Indo-Islamic architecture.

assets.title: Machu Picchu
assets.historical_significance: 15th-century Inca citadel in the Andes, an icon of pre-Columbian engineering and one of the New Seven Wonders.

assets.title: Great Wall of China
assets.historical_significance: Continuous defensive fortifications begun in the 7th century BCE; the most recognized monument of imperial China.

assets.title: Pyramids of Giza
assets.historical_significance: Only surviving Ancient Wonder; Old Kingdom royal tombs and the Great Sphinx.

assets.title: The Starry Night
assets.historical_significance: Van Gogh's swirling night sky, among the most famous paintings in the world.

assets.title: Colosseum
assets.historical_significance: Roman amphitheatre (80 CE), the largest ever built and the enduring emblem of imperial Rome.

assets.title: The Great Wave off Kanagawa
assets.historical_significance: Hokusai's woodblock print, the most reproduced image of Japanese art.

assets.title: Mona Lisa
assets.historical_significance: Leonardo's enigmatic portrait, the most recognized painting on earth.

assets.title: Lion (Panthera leo)
assets.historical_significance: The 'king of beasts', a universal emblem of strength across human cultures.

assets.title: Tiger (Panthera tigris)
assets.historical_significance: Largest living cat and an endangered icon of Asian wilderness.

assets.title: Petra
assets.historical_significance: Rock-cut Nabataean caravan city; the Treasury facade is among the most photographed monuments on earth.

assets.title: Grand Canyon
assets.historical_significance: Mile-deep gorge carved by the Colorado River, exposing two billion years of geology.

assets.title: Girl with a Pearl Earring
assets.historical_significance: Vermeer's luminous tronie, the 'Mona Lisa of the North'.

assets.title: Giant Panda (Ailuropoda melanoleuca)
assets.historical_significance: Bamboo-eating bear, the global symbol of wildlife conservation.

assets.title: Angkor Wat
assets.historical_significance: Largest religious monument in the world, a 12th-century Khmer temple-city.

assets.title: Sunflowers
assets.historical_significance: Van Gogh's series of sunflower still lifes, a National Gallery treasure.

assets.title: Acropolis of Athens
assets.historical_significance: Classical citadel crowned by the Parthenon, the architectural ideal of Western antiquity.

assets.title: Christ the Redeemer
assets.historical_significance: Art Deco statue above Rio de Janeiro; a New Seven Wonder and symbol of Brazil.

assets.title: Stonehenge
assets.historical_significance: Neolithic and Bronze Age stone circle on Salisbury Plain, aligned to the solstices.

assets.title: Mount Fuji
assets.historical_significance: Sacred symmetrical volcano, Japan's most depicted natural icon.

assets.title: The Kiss
assets.historical_significance: Klimt's gold-leaf masterpiece of the Vienna Secession.

assets.title: Chichen Itza
assets.historical_significance: Maya-Toltec city dominated by the pyramid of El Castillo; a New Seven Wonder.

assets.title: The Scream
assets.historical_significance: Munch's icon of modern anxiety.

assets.title: African Elephant (Loxodonta africana)
assets.historical_significance: Largest living land animal and a flagship of conservation.

assets.title: Great Barrier Reef
assets.historical_significance: World's largest coral reef system, visible from space and rich in marine life.

assets.title: Polar Bear (Ursus maritimus)
assets.historical_significance: Apex predator of the sea ice and a symbol of climate change.

assets.title: The Night Watch
assets.historical_significance: Rembrandt's monumental 1642 militia portrait, centrepiece of the Rijksmuseum.

assets.title: Vitruvian Man
assets.historical_significance: Leonardo's study of human proportion, an emblem of the Renaissance.

assets.title: Water Lilies
assets.historical_significance: Monet's immersive series from his Giverny garden.

assets.title: The Birth of Venus
assets.historical_significance: Botticelli's mythological masterpiece of the Florentine Renaissance.

assets.title: Sagrada Familia
assets.historical_significance: Gaudi's unfinished Barcelona basilica, a singular work of Catalan Modernism.

assets.title: Serengeti
assets.historical_significance: Vast savanna hosting the great migration of wildebeest and zebra.

assets.title: Terracotta Army
assets.historical_significance: Thousands of life-size clay warriors guarding the tomb of China's first emperor.

assets.title: Snow Leopard (Panthera uncia)
assets.historical_significance: Elusive 'ghost of the mountains' of the high Himalaya.

assets.title: Alhambra
assets.historical_significance: Moorish palace-fortress in Granada, the finest surviving example of Islamic Spain.

assets.title: Banff and the Canadian Rockies
assets.historical_significance: Glacial peaks and turquoise lakes of Canada's first national park.

assets.title: Mont-Saint-Michel
assets.historical_significance: Tidal island abbey rising from Normandy's bay, a masterpiece of medieval architecture.

assets.title: Northern Lights of Lapland
assets.historical_significance: Aurora borealis over the Arctic, a premier natural-wonder subject.

assets.title: The Milkmaid
assets.historical_significance: Vermeer's quiet masterpiece of domestic light, a Rijksmuseum highlight.

assets.title: Wanderer above the Sea of Fog
assets.historical_significance: Friedrich's Romantic icon of the sublime.

assets.title: Forbidden City
assets.historical_significance: Ming and Qing imperial palace complex in Beijing, the largest in the world.

assets.title: Galapagos Islands
assets.historical_significance: Volcanic archipelago whose endemic life shaped Darwin's theory of evolution.

assets.title: Moai of Easter Island
assets.historical_significance: Monumental Rapa Nui stone heads, an enigma of Polynesian sculpture.

assets.title: Cheetah (Acinonyx jubatus)
assets.historical_significance: Fastest land animal, sprinting across the open savanna.

assets.title: Red Panda (Ailurus fulgens)
assets.historical_significance: Charismatic Himalayan mammal beloved worldwide.

assets.title: Antelope Canyon
assets.historical_significance: Sculpted sandstone slot canyon famed for shafts of light.

assets.title: American Gothic
assets.historical_significance: Grant Wood's enduring image of rural America.

assets.title: Blue Whale (Balaenoptera musculus)
assets.historical_significance: Largest animal ever known to have lived.

assets.title: Hagia Sophia
assets.historical_significance: Byzantine cathedral turned mosque (537 CE), a pinnacle of late-antique architecture.

assets.title: Bald Eagle (Haliaeetus leucocephalus)
assets.historical_significance: National bird of the United States and a raptor icon.

assets.title: Iguazu Falls
assets.historical_significance: Sweeping system of 275 waterfalls on the Argentina-Brazil border.

assets.title: Thirty-six Views of Mount Fuji
assets.historical_significance: Hokusai's celebrated woodblock series.

assets.title: The Birds of America plates
assets.historical_significance: Audubon's life-size ornithological engravings, a Library of Congress treasure.

assets.title: Cappadocia
assets.historical_significance: Volcanic 'fairy chimney' landscape with rock-cut churches and underground cities.

assets.title: Monarch Butterfly (Danaus plexippus)
assets.historical_significance: Famous for its multi-generational continental migration.

assets.title: Pompeii
assets.historical_significance: Roman city preserved by the 79 CE eruption of Vesuvius, a window into daily antiquity.

assets.title: Yellowstone
assets.historical_significance: World's first national park, famed for geysers and wildlife.

assets.title: Gray Wolf (Canis lupus)
assets.historical_significance: Keystone predator central to myth and rewilding.

assets.title: Mount Kilimanjaro
assets.historical_significance: Africa's highest peak, a free-standing volcano above the savanna.

assets.title: Victoria Falls
assets.historical_significance: One of the world's largest waterfalls on the Zambezi, 'the smoke that thunders'.

assets.title: Emperor Penguin (Aptenodytes forsteri)
assets.historical_significance: Largest penguin, breeding through the Antarctic winter.

assets.title: Kiyomizu-dera and the Temples of Kyoto
assets.historical_significance: Historic Buddhist and Shinto monuments of the former imperial capital.

assets.title: Mountain Gorilla (Gorilla beringei)
assets.historical_significance: Critically endangered great ape of the Virunga volcanoes.

assets.title: Salar de Uyuni
assets.historical_significance: World's largest salt flat, a vast mirror under the Andean sky.

assets.title: Jaguar (Panthera onca)
assets.historical_significance: Largest cat of the Americas and apex predator of the Amazon.

assets.title: The Garden of Earthly Delights
assets.historical_significance: Bosch's fantastical triptych in the Prado.

assets.title: Great White Shark (Carcharodon carcharias)
assets.historical_significance: Ocean's most famous predator.

assets.title: Koala (Phascolarctos cinereus)
assets.historical_significance: Iconic Australian marsupial of the eucalyptus forest.

assets.title: Plitvice Lakes
assets.historical_significance: Terraced turquoise lakes and waterfalls in karst forest.

assets.title: Declaration of Independence
assets.historical_significance: Founding document of the United States, held by the Library of Congress.

assets.title: Book of Kells (folios)
assets.historical_significance: Lavishly illuminated Insular Gospel manuscript.

assets.title: Green Sea Turtle (Chelonia mydas)
assets.historical_significance: Ancient ocean mariner and conservation flagship.

assets.title: Axolotl (Ambystoma mexicanum)
assets.historical_significance: Neotenic salamander, a regeneration icon.

assets.title: Las Meninas
assets.historical_significance: Velazquez's complex meditation on painting and the royal court.

assets.title: Borobudur
assets.historical_significance: Largest Buddhist temple in the world, a 9th-century Mahayana monument in Java.

assets.title: Hummingbird (Trochilidae)
assets.historical_significance: Iridescent nectar-feeders, the smallest birds.

assets.title: Kunstformen der Natur plates
assets.historical_significance: Ernst Haeckel's natural-form lithographs, a Public Domain Review favourite.

assets.title: Impression, Sunrise
assets.historical_significance: Monet's harbour scene that named Impressionism.

assets.title: A Sunday on La Grande Jatte
assets.historical_significance: Seurat's pointillist landmark.

assets.title: The Fighting Temeraire
assets.historical_significance: Turner's elegiac National Gallery seascape.

assets.title: Orangutan (Pongo)
assets.historical_significance: Critically endangered great ape of Borneo and Sumatra.

assets.title: Bagan
assets.historical_significance: Plain of thousands of Buddhist temples and pagodas from the Pagan Kingdom.

assets.title: Magna Carta
assets.historical_significance: 1215 charter foundational to constitutional liberty.

assets.title: Gutenberg Bible
assets.historical_significance: First major book printed with movable type in the West.

assets.title: Voynich Manuscript
assets.historical_significance: Undeciphered illustrated codex, an enduring mystery.

assets.title: Mercator World Map (1569)
assets.historical_significance: Introduced the projection that reshaped navigation.

assets.title: American Bison (Bison bison)
assets.historical_significance: Symbol of the Great Plains and conservation recovery.

assets.title: Whale Shark (Rhincodon typus)
assets.historical_significance: Largest living fish, a gentle filter feeder.

assets.title: Blaeu Atlas Maior
assets.historical_significance: The grandest atlas of the Dutch Golden Age of cartography.

assets.title: Komodo Dragon (Varanus komodoensis)
assets.historical_significance: World's largest living lizard.

assets.title: Resplendent Quetzal (Pharomachrus mocinno)
assets.historical_significance: Sacred Mesoamerican bird of brilliant plumage.

assets.title: Waldseemuller World Map (1507)
assets.historical_significance: First map to name 'America'; the Library of Congress 'birth certificate' of the New World.

assets.title: Shakespeare First Folio
assets.historical_significance: First collected edition of Shakespeare's plays (1623).

assets.title: Metamorphosis insectorum Surinamensium
assets.historical_significance: Maria Sibylla Merian's pioneering botanical and entomological plates.

assets.title: The Anatomy Lesson of Dr. Tulp
assets.historical_significance: Rembrandt's group portrait of a dissection.

assets.title: Uranometria Star Atlas (1603)
assets.historical_significance: Bayer's celestial atlas, foundational to star charting.

assets.title: Lewis and Clark Expedition Map
assets.historical_significance: Charting the American West, held by the Library of Congress.

assets.title: Tabula Rogeriana
assets.historical_significance: Al-Idrisi's 1154 world map, among the most advanced of the Middle Ages.

assets.title: Carta Marina (1539)
assets.historical_significance: Olaus Magnus's richly illustrated map of the Nordic seas.

assets.title: Hereford Mappa Mundi
assets.historical_significance: Largest surviving medieval world map.
